title: PAI: The Life OS for AI-Powered Development
summary: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) is a Life OS built on Claude Code that provides AI agents with persistent memory of project context, custom skills, and structured workflows. It uses a seven-phase algorithm to help developers maintain continuity across coding sessions and avoid re-explaining project architecture and decisions to their AI assistant.
writeup: This video covers PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure), a Life OS built on Claude Code that gives AI agents persistent memory of project architecture, coding standards, decisions, and workflows across sessions. The core problem it addresses is context loss between agent sessions, where standards and prior decisions have to be re-supplied each time. Key components include a Pulse dashboard and a seven-phase algorithm structured around observe, think, plan, build, execute, verify, and learn cycles.
